pages.raw_text:
The Order of Railway Conductors
will meet in their rooms in oliver hall
Tuesday night


The annual car inventory of the
Northern Pacific Is now being made.


"Who will have the choice passen-
ger runs on the new division?" is the
question now being asked by railway
men, On January / the new division
will be commenced and extend from
Trout Greek. Mont. to Ellensburg.
with Spokane as the headquarters.
Thirteen passenger crews will be re-
quired in the operation of the divis-
ion. These will run first In and first
out of Spokane. Ellensburg and Trout
Creek. The oldest conductors in point
OF seniority will be given prefer
ence for this division.


orders have been issued to passen-
ger trainmen to closely watch what
IL simple scheme to defraud the
company out of fares. On leaving for
his berth 1t sometimes happens that
the traveller leaves his hat check with
q new arrival who passed unnoticed
by the conductor on that account.
The sleeping car porter completes
the business when he fails to take
caro- of the hat check.


Northern Pacific engineers and
trainmen are taking the wind" The
Westinghouse air brake instruction
car is now in the yards and the ex-
aminations were commenced on Sat
urday, to be continued for two weeks.
Enginemen are examined at 0 a. m.
and trainmen at 2 r. IN. All IN these
branches of the service are required
10 take the examinations.


The endorsement of passes, which
Is so often overlooked. will hereafter
be followed according to rules. Wig
orous action has. been recommended
on all lines and conductors all eau
toned about not taking them up un-
less endorsed


After January IT, s. Collins. local
representative of the Chjca go North
western. will have his office in No.
] Marble Bank building.
